args: if [[ -x ./mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh ]]; then RESOLVER=./mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh; elif [[ -x ../mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh ]]; then RESOLVER=../mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh; else echo "resolve-node-path.sh not found (checked ./mcp-server and ../mcp-server)" >&2; exit 1; fi; export PATH="$($RESOLVER)"; exec npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github

if [[ -x ./mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh ]]; then RESOLVER=./mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh; elif [[ -x ../mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh ]]; then RESOLVER=../mcp-server/resolve-node-path.sh; else echo "resolve-node-path.sh not found (checked ./mcp-server and ../mcp-server)" >&2; exit 1; fi; DOC_ROOT=./documentation; if [[ ! -d "$DOC_ROOT" && -d ../documentation ]]; then DOC_ROOT=../documentation; fi; export PATH="$($RESOLVER)"; exec npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem "$DOC_ROOT"

if [[ -x ./mcp-server/launch.sh ]]; then exec ./mcp-server/launch.sh; elif [[ -x ../mcp-server/launch.sh ]]; then exec ../mcp-server/launch.sh; else echo "launch.sh not found (checked ./mcp-server and ../mcp-server)" >&2; exit 1; fi
